competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Ayase Ueda (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Hannibal Mejbri (Tunisia) right footed shot from long range on the left is close, but misses the top right corner.

events.description: 汉尼拔·梅布里射门偏出。

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 镰田大地 进球，中村敬斗 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ayase Ueda (Japan) left footed shot from the centre of the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Ko Itakura.

events.description: 上田绮世射门偏出。 板仓滉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Takehiro Tomiyasu (Japan).
Corner, Japan. Conceded by Dylan Bronn.
Attempt saved. Ayase Ueda (Japan) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Aymen Dahmen (Tunisia).
Attempt missed. Takehiro Tomiyasu (Japan) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is close, but misses to the right following a corner.
Corner, Japan. Conceded by Aymen Dahmen.
Ritsu Doan (Japan) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Ayase Ueda (Japan).
Corner, Tunisia. Conceded by Ko Itakura.
Hannibal Mejbri (Tunisia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Takehiro Tomiyasu (Japan).
Aymen Dahmen (Tunisia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Takehiro Tomiyasu (Japan).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 上田绮世 进球，板仓滉 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Junya Ito (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Kaishu Sano (Japan).
Foul by Junya Ito (Japan).
Daichi Kamada (Japan) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Zion Suzuki (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ko Itakura (Japan).
First Half ends, Tunisia 0, Japan 2.

qualifiers.on: 穆罕默德·阿明·本·赫米达

events.description: 穆罕默德·阿明·本·赫米达 登场，迪伦·布朗 离场
伊斯梅尔·加尔比 登场，埃利亚斯·萨阿德 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Tunisia 0, Japan 2.
Attempt missed. Ao Tanaka (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Ayase Ueda.

events.description: 田中青射门偏出。 上田绮世参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Hiroki Ito (Japan).
Foul by Hiroki Ito (Japan).
Corner, Japan. Conceded by Mohamed Amine Ben Hmida.
Ritsu Doan (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Kaishu Sano (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Ayase Ueda (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Hiroki Ito.

events.description: 上田绮世射门被封堵。 伊藤洋辉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Japan. Conceded by Montassar Talbi.

events.description: 菲拉斯·查瓦特 登场，塞巴斯蒂安·图内克蒂 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Keito Nakamura (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Daichi Kamada.

events.description: 中村敬斗射门被封堵。 镰田大地参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Keito Nakamura (Japan).

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 伊东纯也 进球，上田绮世 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 菅原由势 登场，杜安律 离场
铃木淳之介 登场，镰田大地 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Tunisia. Conceded by Junnosuke Suzuki.
Corner, Tunisia. Conceded by Junya Ito.
Attempt blocked. Ismaël Gharbi (Tunisia) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Omar Rekik.

events.description: 伊斯梅尔·加尔比射门被封堵。 奥马尔·雷基克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Tunisia. Omar Rekik is caught offside.
Offside, Japan. Keito Nakamura is caught offside.
Corner, Japan. Conceded by Mohamed Amine Ben Hmida.

events.description: 铃木佑人 登场，中村敬斗 离场
濑古步 登场，富安健洋 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ao Tanaka (Japan).
Foul by Hiroki Ito (Japan).

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 上田绮世 进球，佐野海舟 助攻
后藤圭介 登场，上田绮世 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Junya Ito (Japan) right footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Ayumu Seko.

events.description: 伊东纯也射门被封堵。 濑古步参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Omar Rekik (Tunisia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 伊莱亚斯·阿乔里 登场，阿里·阿布迪 离场
拉尼·赫迪拉 登场，埃利耶·希斯里 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ayumu Seko (Japan).
Foul by Kaishu Sano (Japan).
Keisuke Goto (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。
